economic_notes: Four government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method: Sucker Creek Holdings Ltd., Sucker Creek Gas Utility, Sucker Creek First Nation Co-op, SCFN Services Limited Partnership. COVID-19 pandemic noted as creating uncertainty. ATB line of credit available up to $500,000, balance nil at year end.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to verify carrying value of long-term investment in SCFN Services Limited Partnership (March 31, 2019 financials used instead of 2020). Prior period adjustment of $889,542 decrease to opening accumulated surplus due to SCFN Services LP investment not recorded in prior year. Four GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Ottawa Trust Funds of $1,619,435 held by Government of Canada included in financial assets. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $12,286,477 + Government of Alberta $2,305,519 + LSLIRC $825,161 + CMHC $554,139 = $15,971,296. Expenses by segment include Community Services $582,769, Economic Development $1,674,157, and Other $708,892 not mapped to standard categories.
